sources.name: TheSmackDownHotel PPV & Special Events Database
sources.notes: Primary source for major and active promotion events. Use event detail pages for card/results/location where available.

sources.name: Cagematch Promotions Index
sources.notes: Fallback source for defunct promotions and historical gaps. Requires a browser/session-aware adapter rather than plain HTTP.

sources.name: Wrestlingdata event archive
sources.notes: Browser/session-aware event archive source. Promotion-year pages expose event date, type, attendance, line-up availability, and spoiler-safe card pages with venues, announcers, title matches, stipulations, champions, and participants.

sources.name: Wikipedia champion lists
sources.notes: Parse tabled reign history: number, champion, championship change columns, and reign statistics columns.
